name: Greedy Whalebuffet+ v2.1-rc3 (edited by Sai)
author: kianu
bootlegger: Before the game, each player chooses at least two normal characters from each category: Townsfolk, Outsider, Minion, and Demon. The Storyteller then selects from those characters* to create a valid setup.

Normal characters do not change alignments, add Evil players, or warp the game. The game-warping characters are: Atheist, Alchemist, Philosopher, Heretic, Summoner, and Lil Monsta. Before setup, the Storyteller may declare additional characters to be abnormal.
*If a player chooses the Choirboy, Alchemist, Amnesiac, Village Idiot, Kazali, or Legion, some players may not receive the character they requested.
The Drunk, Lunatic, and Marionette cannot be chosen, but they may be assigned by the Storyteller. The Hermit may also be assigned with the Lunatic or Drunk ability, even if it was not chosen.
The Demon does not receive bluffs.
Any character with Ω in its name has been adjusted.
Greedy uses some special jinxes. These can be found via the Almanac link to the website at the top of the character sheet.

name: Choose your characters
ability: Choose what you want to play. Choose at least 2 normal characters of each type: Townsfolk, Outsider, Minion, and Demon. You learn your actual character before the game starts.
flavor: Trust, I am that bitch. -Kianu
firstNightReminder: Choose at least 2 normal characters from each category.

special.name: card
special.value: At least 2 normal per type, most wanted first

special.name: card
special.value: More choices please! See "Normal" in Bootlegger

name: Alchemist
ability: You have a Minion ability. When using this, the Storyteller may prompt you to choose differently.
flavor: I wanna be different so badly, but I ALWAYSSSS choose Alchemist -Literally Everyone
firstNightReminder: Show the *YOU ARE* info token and a Minion token.

name: Cannibal
ability: You have the ability of the recently killed executee. If they are evil, you are poisoned until a good player dies by execution.
flavor: If you are what you eat, then I am an innocent being!

name: Courtier Ω
ability: Twice per game, at night, choose a different character: they are drunk for 3 nights & 3 days.
flavor: Remember kids, alcohol is poison, and royalty doesn't have to follow the rules! -Aloe
firstNightReminder: The Courtier might choose a character. :reminder: :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Courtier might choose a character. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Cult Leader Ω
ability: Each night, you become the alignment of an alive neighbour. If all good players choose to join your cult, your team wins. If you die at night, become good.
flavor: I'd like to start the cult of chaos. -Evan (Evil Twin)
firstNightReminder: The Cult Leader might change alignment. If so, show the *YOU ARE* info token & give a thumb signal.
otherNightReminder: The Cult Leader might change alignment. If the Cult Leader dies at any time tonight, they become good. If they changed, show the *YOU ARE* info token & give a thumb signal.

name: Engineer Ω
ability: Once per game, during the day, visit the Storyteller to learn a number of in play Minion or Demon characters equal to the Day.
flavor: day 3: goblin, goblin, scarlet woman - Benny's the Kazali -the engineer

name: Flowergirl
ability: Each night*, you learn if a Demon voted today.
flavor: Er is geen probleem, er is geen aanpak nodig, het beste ding is om niets te doen, het is irrelevant en iedereen moet het vergeten. -Victor_ian
otherNightReminder: Either nod or shake your head.

name: Huntsman Ω
ability: You start knowing an in play Outsider. They can't change character from other abilities. Once per game, at night, choose a player: that Outsider, if chosen, becomes a not in play good Townsfolk. [+0 or +1 Outsider]
flavor: You don't get to be the Heretic -TrappedCosmos
firstNightReminder: Wake the Huntsman & show the token of their target Outsider. They might choose a player. :reminder: If they choose the Outsider they learned: Put the Huntsman to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* info token & their new character token.
otherNightReminder: The Huntsman might choose a player. :reminder: If they choose the Outsider they learned: Put the Huntsman to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* info token & their new character token.

name: Magician
ability: The Demon thinks you are a Minion. Minions think you are a Demon.
flavor: No I don't think I will. -Mole
firstNightReminder: During Minion Info, point to the Magician and the Demon. During Demon Info, point to the Magician and the Minions.

name: Mathematician
ability: Each night, you learn how many players' abilities worked abnormally (since dawn) due to another character's ability.
flavor: Math is like clocktower. You don't know what you're trying to do, nor do you know how to accomplish it. And yet, you succeed -iexistlol
firstNightReminder: Give a finger signal.
otherNightReminder: Give a finger signal.

name: Mayor Ω
ability: If only 3 players live (travellers don't count) & no execution occurs, your team wins. If you die at night, another player might die instead.
flavor: Entrust in my rightfully elected position against the dark ages that fall before us. You do not recall your vote? Don't worry about it; for I am the legitimate, healthy, and fairly elected Mayor of this town. Putting trust in politics has never failed you before.

name: Philosopher Ω
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a good character: gain that ability. You may be told to reconsider. If you pick a character that's not helpful to your team or ruins the games balance 3 times, you become Drunk.
flavor: If one thing in life is real, it's beer. In pursuit of others achievements, we lose sight of our own desires. -Kianu
firstNightReminder: The Philosopher either shows a 'no' head signal, or points to a good character. Tell them to reconsider if the ability isn't helpful to their team or ruins the games balance. After 3 attempts & 3 reconsiders, Drunk them.
otherNightReminder: The Philosopher either shows a 'no' head signal, or points to a good character. Tell them to reconsider if the ability isn't helpful to their team or ruins the games balance. After 3 attempts & 3 reconsiders, Drunk them.

name: Poppy Grower Ω
ability: Minions & Demons do not know each other. If you die (even if poisoned or drunk), they learn who each other are at night.
flavor: We’re doing poppy’s on the dance floor! I feel the rush & I’m pissing all over this stage tonight! -Satyr
firstNightReminder: Skip Minion Info and Demon Info.
otherNightReminder: If the Poppy Grower died today or tonight, run Minion Info and Demon Info.

name: Preacher
ability: Each night, choose a player: a Minion, if chosen, learns this. All chosen Minions have no ability.
flavor: People are getting too loud. -Al-Hadashi
firstNightReminder: The Preacher chooses a player. :reminder: If they chose a Minion: Put the Preacher to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Preacher tokens.
otherNightReminder: The Preacher chooses a player. :reminder: If they chose a Minion: Put the Preacher to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Preacher tokens.

name: Princess
ability: On your 1st day, if you nominated & executed a player, the Demon doesn't kill tonight.
flavor: Embarassssinngggggg -Spectrum
otherNightReminder: If the Princess nominated the player who was executed today, wake the Demon as normal, but no one dies to the Demon's ability. :reminder:

name: Soldier Ω
ability: You are safe from the Demon. Each night, if your ability protected you from the Demon, wake and learn this.
flavor: As The Spy said to the Heretic, as Mole said to Al-Hadashi, as people believing I’m not the Wraith… No. -Iceni
firstNightReminder: If the Soldier was protected, wake them and nod.
otherNightReminder: If the Soldier was protected, wake them and nod.

name: Butler
ability: Each night, choose a player (not yourself): tomorrow, you may only vote if they are voting too.
flavor: Breathe, Identify the problem, Tea break, Consider your options, Handle it. B.I.T.C.H -Alfred Pennyworth
firstNightReminder: The Butler chooses a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Butler chooses a player. :reminder:

name: Drunk
ability: You do not know you are the Drunk. You think you are a Townsfolk character, but you are not.
flavor: I may be drunk, but I didn't drink an ounce of beer! Somehow? -Spectrum

name: Hatter Ω
ability: If you die, at night, choose Minions or Demons. All players of the type you chose picks new characters of the same type to be.
flavor: 10/6 is a much greater number than 6 - 7  -Soril
otherNightReminder: If the Hatter died, wake the Hatter. They point to either Minions or Demons. Put the Hatter to sleep. Wake each player of the type they chose. Each may choose a new character. If they do, show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token.

name: Heretic Ω
ability: Whoever wins, loses, & whoever loses, wins. If only evil players are alive, evil wins (therefore good wins). This ability works even if you are dead.
flavor: I swear if it's a Heretic game. -Mole

name: Hermit Ω
ability: You have 3 Outsider abilities. You know each, even if drunk or poisoned. [-0 or -1 Outsiders]
flavor: Goon Goon Goon! - Satyr
firstNightReminder: If the Hermit does not have the Drunk or Lunatic abilities, wake the Hermit. Show the character token of each ability they have. Run any Outsider abilities the Hermit has.
otherNightReminder: Run any Outsider abilities the Hermit has.

name: Lunatic Ω
ability: You think you are a Demon, but you are not. The Demon knows who you are & who you choose at night.
flavor: If I'm the Lunatic I'm gonna be very angry -Sam
firstNightReminder: If there are 7 or more players, wake the Lunatic: Show the *THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS* token. Point to any players. Show the *THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY* token. Show 3 good character tokens. Put the Lunatic to sleep. Wake the Demon. Show the *YOU ARE* info token and the Demon token. Show the *THIS PLAYER IS* info token and the Lunatic token, then point to the Lunatic.
otherNightReminder: Do whatever needs to be done to simulate the Demon acting. Put the Lunatic to sleep. Wake the Demon. Show the Lunatic token & point to them, then their target(s).

name: Plague Doctor
ability: When you die, the Storyteller gains a Minion ability.
flavor: You're all my marionettes now.
otherNightReminder: If the Plague Doctor died, the Storyteller gained a Minion ability. If you haven't done this yet, do so now. :reminder:

name: Recluse Ω
ability: You might register as any character, alignment, or living status, even if dead.
flavor: I love men -You know who.

name: Snitch Ω
ability: Each Minion starts knowing a different in-play good character.
flavor: It was Al-Hadashi -Taken Kianu
firstNightReminder: Wake each Minion. Show each a different in-play good character token.

name: Sweetheart Ω
ability: When you die, 1 player is drunk from now on. When dead, you may guess (once) which. If correct, all players learn you are the Sweetheart tonight.
flavor: My heart will go on! *Penny whistle solo*. -Miss Chief
otherNightReminder: If the Sweetheart died, a player became drunk immediately. If you haven't done this yet, do so now. :reminder: If the Sweetheart made a correct guess when dead, wake each player. Show them *THIS PLAYER IS* info token & the Sweetheart token.

name: Boffin
ability: The Demon (even if drunk or poisoned) has a not-in-play good character's ability. You both know which.
flavor: Sometimes the questions are complicated and the answers are simple. -Dr. Seuss
firstNightReminder: Wake the Boffin and the Demon. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Boffin tokens, then the not-in-play good character token.

name: Cerenovus
ability: Each night, choose a player & a good character: they are "mad" they are this character tomorrow, or might be executed.
flavor: what are you on about, im definitely the politician, yep, nothing to see here - SereNOvus Shrek
firstNightReminder: The Cerenovus chooses a player & a character. :reminder: Put the Cerenovus to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token, the Cerenovus token, then the madness-character token.
otherNightReminder: The Cerenovus chooses a player & a character. :reminder: Put the Cerenovus to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token, the Cerenovus token, then the madness-character token.

name: Evil Twin
ability: You & an opposing player know each other. If the good player is executed, evil wins. Good can't win if you both live.
flavor: Yeah that’s my Twinnem, Go best friend! -Mattoo
firstNightReminder: Wake both twins. Allow eye contact. Show the good twin's character token to the Evil Twin & vice versa.

name: Marionette
ability: You think you are a good character, but you are not. The Demon knows who you are. [You neighbor the Demon]
flavor: I would like to Wizard wish that everyone must tell one of their neighbors they're their Marionette. -Drazhar
firstNightReminder: Wake the Demon. Show the *THIS PLAYER IS* & Marionette tokens. Point to the Marionette.

name: Pit-Hag Ω
ability: Each other night*, you may choose a player & character they become (if not in play). If a potential evil-making character or Demon is made, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
flavor: Its definetly not a Vortox game... yet -Fleuris
otherNightReminder: The Pit-Hag chooses a player & a character. If they chose a character that is not in play: Put the Pit-Hag to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token.

name: Psychopath Ω
ability: If there are 5 or more alive players (not including travellers), each day, before nominations, you may publicly choose a player: they die. If executed, you only die if you lose roshambo.
flavor: My weapon of choice? Old man farts. -Jyraphe

name: Scarlet Woman
ability: If there are 5 or more players alive & the Demon dies, you become the Demon. (Travellers don't count.)
flavor: The first person to say "Smooch" at me will get to pick the quote! You can only choose 1 quote.
otherNightReminder: If the Scarlet Woman became the Demon today, show them the *YOU ARE* token, then the Demon token.

name: Spy
ability: Each night, you see the Grimoire. You might register as good & as a Townsfolk or Outsider, even if dead.
flavor: The world's greatest actor doesn't need a stage... -Soril
firstNightReminder: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Spy needs.
otherNightReminder: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Spy needs.

name: Summoner Ω
ability: On the 3rd night, choose a player: they become an evil Demon of your choice. [No Demon]
flavor: With this treasure, I summon… -Chara
otherNightReminder: Change the Summoner reminder token to the relevant night. :reminder: If it's night 2, ask the Summoner if they want to create a Pukka. If it is night 3, the Summoner chooses a player & a Demon character. Put the Summoner to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* and Demon tokens & give a thumbs-down.

name: Vizier
ability: All players know you are the Vizier. You cannot die during the day. If good voted, you may choose to execute immediately.
flavor: No thank youuu -Reece
firstNightReminder: If no Alsaahir or Investigator is in-play: Announce which player is the Vizier.

name: Widow
ability: On your 1st night, look at the Grimoire & choose a player: they are poisoned. 1 good player knows a Widow is in play.
flavor: The first person to say "Widowmaker" at me will get to pick the quote! You can only choose 1 quote.
firstNightReminder: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Widow needs. The Widow chooses a player. :reminder: Put the Widow to sleep. Wake the player marked *KNOW* & show the Widow token. :reminder:

name: Wizard Ω
ability: Once per game, choose to make a wish. If granted, it might have a price & leave a clue as to its nature. If you propose a declined wish for your team 3 times, you turn into a character of the same type.
flavor: Madam Morrible-- MM, flip it around? Wicked Witch!! -Orpheus
firstNightReminder: Do whatever needs to be done to satisfy the Wizard's ability. If they make a stupid wish, put the "Bruh" reminder token next to them. :reminder: At 3 Bruh's, turn them into a character of the same type.
otherNightReminder: Do whatever needs to be done to satisfy the Wizard's ability. If they make a stupid wish, put the "Bruh" reminder token next to them. :reminder: At 3 Bruh's, turn them into a character of the same type.

name: Wraith
ability: You may choose to open your eyes at night. You wake when other evil players do.
flavor: I am Iceni.
firstNightReminder: Wake the Wraith whenever other evil players wake.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Wraith whenever other evil players wake.

name: Al-Hadikhia
ability: Each night*, you may choose 3 players (all players learn who): each silently chooses to live or die, but if all live, all die.
flavor: This is for all my demons who don’t get hyped enough
otherNightReminder: The Al-Hadikhia chooses 3 players. :reminder: :reminder: :reminder: In order, wake each target. They nod or shake their head. Put them to sleep before waking the next target.

name: Kazali Ω
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. [You choose which players are which Minions, your Minion choices may be denied. -? to +? Outsiders]
flavor: Let's lock in besties. -Nic
firstNightReminder: The Kazali chooses which players are which Minions. Deny their Minion choices until the game is balanced. Wake each target. Show the *YOU ARE* and Minion tokens & give a thumbs-down.
otherNightReminder: The Kazali chooses a player. :reminder:

name: Legion
ability: Each night*, a player might die. Executions fail if only evil voted. You register as a Minion too. [Most players are Legion]
flavor: It's an Atheist game. Also, Orpheus is my evil twin. -Spectrum
otherNightReminder: A player might die. :reminder:

name: Leviathan
ability: If more than 1 good player is executed, evil wins. All players know you are in play. After day 5, evil wins.
flavor: Don't worry it's just a Wizard wish. -The Politician
firstNightReminder: Announce that the Leviathan is in play. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: Wake the Leviathan to choose a player if one of their jinxes permits. Change the Leviathan reminder token to the relevant day. :reminder: At dawn, you may announce that the Leviathan is in play.

name: Lleech
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You start by choosing a player: they are poisoned. You die if & only if they are dead.
flavor: 'For Science!' said definitely the Sailor -boypower
firstNightReminder: The Lleech chooses a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Lleech chooses a player. :reminder:

name: Riot
ability: On your third day, Minions become Riot & nominees die but nominate an alive player immediately. This must happen.
flavor: Guys I need to leave in 30 minutes
otherNightReminder: Wake the Riot to choose a player if the jinxes permit. :reminder: Change the Riot reminder token to the relevant day. :reminder: If it is night 3, you may wake the Minions before dawn. Show the *YOU ARE* & Riot tokens.

name: Vigormortis
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Minions you kill keep their ability & poison 1 Townsfolk neighbor. [-1 Outsider]
flavor: Your information? What information?
otherNightReminder: The Vigormortis chooses a player. :reminder: If that player is a Minion, poison a neighboring Townsfolk. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Vortox
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Townsfolk abilities yield false info. Each day, if no-one is executed, evil wins.
flavor: The first person to say "Dorothy" at me will get to pick the quote! You can only choose 1 quote.
otherNightReminder: The Vortox chooses a player. :reminder:

name: Yaggababble
ability: You start knowing a secret phrase. For each time you said it publicly today, a player might die.
flavor: Hallo, kan jij jouw bek houden -Victor_ian
firstNightReminder: Show the Yaggababble their secret phrase.
otherNightReminder: For each time the Yaggababble said their phrase today, a player might die. :reminder:

name: Choose a Traveller
ability: Choose a Traveller character to become.
firstNightReminder: The Traveller player chooses a character.

name: Dealer's Choice Ω
ability: During setup, a player may choose Dealer's Choice to allow the Storyteller to assign them any character. They may still describe the style of character they would prefer, or name anything they do not want.
flavor: I got $5 saying Iceni is the Wraith. $20 saying he's the King.
firstNightReminder: OPTIONAL: Ask evil players what they plan to bluff as. This is an open chance to collect claims for the Dreamer or similar abilities. You may not do this at any other time.

name: Choose your characters
ability: This is a dummy duplicate of Choose your characters, so that Minions and Demons can be asked what they are mechanically bluffing as, without this cluttering the main Choose your characters night interface.
flavor: When we get the option to hide signal cards, this will be merged back into the main Choose your characters.

special.name: card
special.value: Who are you mechanically bluffing as?

special.name: card
special.value: Who are you mechanically bluffing as?
